column1: # Mouse click-to-move-pointer — Phase 1 of authentic R3.4a mouse
# support. Click a cell in READY and the cell pointer jumps there.
# Clicks on the column header, row gutter, or non-grid areas are
#   control panel y 0..4, grid y 4..24 (header at y=4, body y>=5),
#   status y=24. ROW_GUTTER=5, default col width 9, so col A
#   occupies x [5,14), col B [14,23), col C [23,32).
# Start state: pointer at A1, mode READY.
# Click inside column B, body row 3 (y = 5 + 2 = 7).
# Click inside column C, body row 1.
# Clicking the column-header row (y=4) is reserved for Phase 2 and
# Clicking inside the row-number gutter (x in [0,5)) is reserved
# for Phase 2 and must not move the pointer.
# Clicking on the bottom status line must not move the pointer.
# A click outside READY (while in MENU) must not move the pointer.
# Escape back to READY; click now takes effect again.
